# WebKitErrorDomain | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ WebKit ](/documentation/webkit)

- [ WebKitErrorDomain ](/documentation/WebKit/WebKitErrorDomain)

-  WebKitErrorDomain 

Global Variable# WebKitErrorDomain

macOS 10.3–10.14Deprecated

```
let WebKitErrorDomain: String
```

## [See Also](/documentation/WebKit/WebKitErrorDomain#see-also)

### [WebKit Constants (Legacy)](/documentation/WebKit/WebKitErrorDomain#WebKit-Constants-Legacy)

[`let WebActionButtonKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webactionbuttonkey)An NSNumber object where `0` indicates the left button, `1` indicates the middle button, and `2` indicates the right button.Deprecated[`let WebActionElementKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webactionelementkey)A dictionary containing element information. See [`WebView`](/documentation/webkit/webview-swift.class) for a description of the key-value pairs in this dictionary.Deprecated[`let WebActionModifierFlagsKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webactionmodifierflagskey)An unsigned number that indicates the modifier flag.Deprecated[`let WebActionNavigationTypeKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webactionnavigationtypekey)The navigation type of the action. Can be any of the values defined in [`WebNavigationType`](/documentation/webkit/webnavigationtype) below.Deprecated[`let WebActionOriginalURLKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webactionoriginalurlkey)The URL that initiated the action.Deprecated[`let WebArchivePboardType: String`](/documentation/webkit/webarchivepboardtype)The pasteboard type constant used when adding or accessing a WebArchive on the pasteboard.Deprecated[`let WebElementDOMNodeKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementdomnodekey)The DOMNode for this element.Deprecated[`let WebElementFrameKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementframekey)The WebFrame object associated with this element.Deprecated[`let WebElementImageAltStringKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementimagealtstringkey)An NSString of the ALT attribute of an image element.Deprecated[`let WebElementImageKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementimagekey)An NSImage representing an image element.Deprecated[`let WebElementImageRectKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementimagerectkey)An NSValue containing an NSRect, the size of an image element.Deprecated[`let WebElementImageURLKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementimageurlkey)An NSURL containing the location of an image element.Deprecated[`let WebElementIsSelectedKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementisselectedkey)An NSNumber used as a BOOL value to indicate whether a text element is selected or not. Zero value indicates false, true otherwise.Deprecated[`let WebElementLinkLabelKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementlinklabelkey)An NSString containing the text within an anchor.Deprecated[`let WebElementLinkTargetFrameKey: String`](/documentation/webkit/webelementlinktargetframekey)The WebFrame object associated with the target of the anchor.Deprecated
